appraisal_events.evidence: « Il ne me persuadait certes pas; et pourtant je me sentais plus heureux, moins à l'étroit. » … « selon Bergotte qui avait l'air de connaître mon cas… »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator presents Bergotte as perceptive and consoling; his words relieve the narrator and suggest diagnostic authority.

status_effects.explanation: He is locally elevated as a trusted, insightful voice whose view eases the narrator’s constraints.
